title: Origins: Rainbow Dash
description: "The fastest and coolest pony in equestria!"
body:
![Epik render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/499cfa59cf4fc5d75a417cedd7366af115875eb2.png)
# Overview
This Aerial Origin focuses on speed and soaring through the skies at top speeds. Not the best for survival however...

Here is the reformatted data, styled as it would be in a Discord message:

---

### **🦄 Pegasus Pony**  
"Being a Pegasus pony is totally awesome! You’ve got these sweet wings, so you can zip around at top speed without worrying about crash landings! Oh, and did I mention you can pull off an epic launch boost whenever you want? Yeah, it’s as cool as it sounds!"

**Badges:**  
- 🖱 **Primary to boost**  
- ℹ️ **Boosting has a long cooldown, so only rely on it for a launch.**  

---

### **🕊️ Wing Power**  
"When you're up in the air, you’ve got total control over your wing power! That means you can keep flying forward at a steady speed, and the more power you put into your wings, the faster you go. It's like being in full control of your awesomeness!"

**Badges:**  
- ℹ️ **Sprint key to increase wing power and sneak key to decrease wing power.**  
- ℹ️ **Max caps at 400.**

---

### **🏃‍♂️Athlete**  
"Being an athlete? Oh yeah, it means I’m faster and tougher than anypony else, no doubt about it! But, yeah, I gotta chow down more to keep all this awesomeness running at max speed. Gotta fuel up if I’m gonna keep breaking records!"  

- **Speed Boost**: You gain extra speed 🏃 (X2 movement speed).  
- **Extra Tough**: You’ve got more health ❤️ (+5 hearts).  
- **High Exhaustion**: You burn through food faster 🍽️ (2.5x more exhaustion).

---

### **🌍 Pony Physique**  
"Okay, so being a pony is pretty rad, but there are some limits. Interdimensional travel? Not really our thing—hang out in other dimensions too long, and it’ll start messing you up. Oh, and some items just won’t work there. Plus, let’s not forget—no meat for us! Gotta stick to those veggies, no matter how cool we are!"  

- **No End Items 🚫**: You can't use certain items like Ender Pearls, Shulker Boxes, and Ender Chests.  
- **Dimension Weakness 🌌**: Leaving the Overworld gives you wither 😵 (1 second every second in The Nether or The End).  
- **Herbivore 🥦**: You cannot eat meat. Stick to plants! 🌿

---

### **🦅 Lightweight**  
"Heavy armor might look tough, but if you throw that on, flying’s out the window! You’ll be grounded, and not just that, you’ll be moving like a slug. So yeah, if you wanna stay fast and airborne, ditch the heavy gear!"  

- **No Flight With Heavy Armor 🛡️**: If your armor rating is 14 or more, you can't fly 🚫🦅.  
- **Slowness With Heavy Armor 🐢**: Wearing heavy armor slows you down (Slowness II).

---

### **🌧️ Weather Control**  
"Controlling the weather? Easy peasy! Pegasi have been doing it for ages. Want sunny skies for a picnic, or a thunderstorm to match your mood? You got it!"  

- **Summon Thunderstorms ⛈️**: You can bring down a thunderstorm on command!  
- **Clear the Skies ☀️**: Dispel any clouds and make it a sunny day.  

---

# DISCLAIMER
This is a VERY early alpha version so many things are subjected to change, if you have any POSITIVE critisism, tell me via the discord forum
